info.name: Civara API (v1)
info.description: Generated from requirements/api-contract.tex. Base URL defaults to production; override {{baseUrl}} for local development.

request.description: GET /health — Checks whether the API is running.

formdata.description: CSV dataset to be analyzed (choose a local .csv file in Postman).
Optional. Defaults to average. Supported: average, math, reading, writing.

request.description: POST /analyze — Uploads a CSV dataset and returns statistical analysis results (multipart/form-data).

response.name: 200 OK (Example Analysis)
400 Bad Request (NO_FILE)
400 Bad Request (INVALID_FILE_TYPE)
400 Bad Request (MISSING_COLUMNS)
400 Bad Request (INVALID_DATA)
400 Bad Request (INSUFFICIENT_GROUPS)
500 Internal Server Error (ANALYSIS_FAILED)
